rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed in component implementation scopes for implementation-level bindings.
Assumptions and guarantees referring to component ports belong in component type scopes.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL architecture by inserting AGREE annexes only in valid scopes.
Use only visible identifiers from the current component scope in AGREE contracts.
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers not present in the analyzed model.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Implementation-level assignments must be placed in implementation annexes.
anti_patterns: Avoid placing implementation-level bindings in component type annexes.
Do not reference ports or data types not present in the current AADL scope.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing parameters
